artifact: RCA report: inconclusive. SQL was not executed, so I cannot distinguish which districts, frequencies, or regions explain the February 1994 drop in new account openings. The planned analysis treats January as a possible one-time spike rather than assuming February is abnormal, and compares account openings by district, frequency, and region for January versus February.

sql.month_counts: SELECT date_trunc('month', CAST(a.date AS DATE)) AS month, COUNT(*) AS new_accounts FROM account a WHERE CAST(a.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1994-01-01' AND CAST(a.date AS DATE) < DATE '1994-03-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
sql.district_frequency_region: WITH base AS (SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(a.date AS DATE) < DATE '1994-02-01' THEN '1994-01' ELSE '1994-02' END AS month, d."A2" AS district, d."A3" AS region, a.frequency, COUNT(*) AS new_accounts FROM account a JOIN district d ON d.district_id=a.district_id WHERE CAST(a.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1994-01-01' AND CAST(a.date AS DATE) < DATE '1994-03-01' GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) SELECT district, region, frequency, SUM(CASE WHEN month='1994-01' THEN new_accounts ELSE 0 END) AS jan_accounts, SUM(CASE WHEN month='1994-02' THEN new_accounts ELSE 0 END) AS feb_accounts, SUM(CASE WHEN month='1994-02' THEN new_accounts ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN month='1994-01' THEN new_accounts ELSE 0 END) AS change FROM base GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY change ASC;

sql.month_counts: SELECT date_trunc('month', CAST(a.date AS DATE)) AS month, COUNT(*) AS new_accounts FROM account a WHERE CAST(a.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1994-01-01' AND CAST(a.date AS DATE) < DATE '1994-03-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
sql.district_frequency_region: WITH base AS (SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(a.date AS DATE) < DATE '1994-02-01' THEN '1994-01' ELSE '1994-02' END AS month, d."A2" AS district, d."A3" AS region, a.frequency, COUNT(*) AS new_accounts FROM account a JOIN district d ON d.district_id=a.district_id WHERE CAST(a.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1994-01-01' AND CAST(a.date AS DATE) < DATE '1994-03-01' GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) SELECT district, region, frequency, SUM(CASE WHEN month='1994-01' THEN new_accounts ELSE 0 END) AS jan_accounts, SUM(CASE WHEN month='1994-02' THEN new_accounts ELSE 0 END) AS feb_accounts, SUM(CASE WHEN month='1994-02' THEN new_accounts ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN month='1994-01' THEN new_accounts ELSE 0 END) AS change FROM base GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY change ASC;
